appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` invariants to reflect the approved single exception for the Review Board exclusion-count query while keeping validation filters mandatory for analytical queries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `.factory/skills/integration-worker/SKILL.md` review-board guidance to explicitly allow one unfiltered exclusion-count query and require all analytical result queries to keep `manipulation_check='passed' AND results_valid=true` filters.
